    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 15:

    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"White cross: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# The bar moved down. Let me check if it's now in the main room below the wall
# or if it went back to the starting area
</parameter>
</function>
